original_question: What does CELEX 31997R2316 state regarding the matter described in the excerpt?
enhanced_question: In accordance with Article 12 of Directive 1997/71/EC (CELEX number 31997R2316), what provisions, if any, relate to the specific requirements and obligations imposed on Member States regarding the implementation of environmental impact assessments for large-scale infrastructure projects?

original_question: What does CELEX 32009R0295 state regarding the matter described in the excerpt?
enhanced_question: In accordance with Article 29 of Directive 2009/29/EC (CELEX number 32009R0295), what specific provisions and directives are applicable to the matters outlined in the provided excerpt, as interpreted by the competent authority pursuant to Article 3(2) of this Regulation?
